v0.1 CLI complete: all 13 commands implemented in dejavue.py (~500 LoC). FTS5 recall with LIKE fallback. git post-commit hook installed. rejected_alternatives field on decision events. Dogfood .dejavue/ created in this repo.
v0.1 CLI shipped: all 13 commands implemented in dejavue.py (~500 LoC). Dogfood .dejavue/ live in this repo with 3 architectural decisions recorded.
next: Phase 2: tests/test_dejavue.sh (bats-style integration test), README.md with quickstart. Then captain handoff review.

summary: v0.1 SHIPPED s156. 13 commands, 33/33 tests, README + concurrency hardening (merge=union .gitattributes). 3 commits on master: 95f0c19 → 176541e → 6aba3d7. Self-hosting verified.

v0.1 productization complete s156. Single-file Python CLI (773 LoC), 13 commands, FTS5 recall with LIKE fallback, git post-commit hook auto-capture (worktree-inherited), merge=union .gitattributes for squadron-pattern branch merges, ctx-pattern absorption (get/list/annotate), rejected-alternatives field on decisions, ingest scrape, since killer-command (date/commit/agent forms with topic keywords), worthiness gate. 33/33 integration tests pass. Self-host dogfood in own .dejavue/.
next: v0.1.2: flock(2) on rebuild_fts/ingest for concurrent-same-tree edge case (low priority, squadron pattern doesn't hit it). v0.2: --semantic flag once joker-mcp Embedder pipeline thread closes (FOREMAN_THREADS). v0.3: joker.dejavue.* MCP shim. v0.4: dejavue migrate-to-jagent. README + spec docs are the canonical reference; foreman_perspective.md captures the design rationale; v0.1_scope.md the build plan + architecture ruling.
